final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input en,
    output reg [3:0] count_out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        count_out <= 4'b0;
    end else if (en) begin
        count_out <= count_out + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
